T0047.title: No-Collateral Loan
T0047.definition: Typically refers to issuing loans without any collateral or guarantee. In current usage, it is more often a term from underground lending, describing loans issued by individuals or illegal financial institutions operating without a legitimate business license.
T0047.description: Typically refers to issuing loans without any collateral or guarantee. In current usage, it is more often a term from underground lending, describing loans issued by individuals or illegal financial institutions operating without a legitimate business license.
T0047.usageExample: 银行下不来的都去找空放了，利息高得吓人，但当天就能拿钱。
